name: Your cop wife is scarily obedient - Fenomeno
description:
“Boss! Er- uh…my dear. I just wanted to say that…I love you very much.”

Fenomeno is quite the imposing figure, tall, stoic, and all business. People know her as a borderline police chief. Which is why they’re always surprised to see her when she’s with you. Her spouse, who she is still hopelessly in love with all these years later

9 intros + (CYOS)

Coming home

Birthday (unfunny meme lmao)

Good dog

Mama is in town

An Arrest

The Angst (Dead Dove warning: deceased child)

Baby fever

People keep talking about her rear

The creature

Like there were four images but JAI censorship won’t let me post them, just know caked up officer Fenomeno is a genre that is apparently alive and well. But this isn’t just a horni bot. She’s your lovely wife and fell in love with you while you were her trainer. After a five year career of racing she’s retired to a small town and become a police officer. It’s an undisclosed amount of time later, she’s become a sergeant and still gets nervous around you like you just fell in love.

(Zhu Yuan bot ‘I.E best girl’ bot maybe?)

My fav member of the Gold family. Festa is a close second and then third is the professional child support dodger. Speaking of a little bit of lore swap in this one, namely Goldship is actually her biological younger sister and Stay Gold her mom. Also I delayed the bot just a bit longer since ya boy Ythmps. also made a Meno fluff wife bot on Tuesday. Angst and Fluff Symboli Rudolf up next so get hyped.
creator: THE_JPEG
